description: Create a 3-node enterprise organization hierarchy in Vtiger CRM by establishing 'AeroTech Dynamics Global HQ' (Industry: Manufacturing) as the parent organization for two subsidiaries: 'AeroTech Dynamics GmbH' (Industry: Manufacturing) and 'AeroTech Dynamics KK' (Industry: Manufacturing). Assign regional contacts to the subsidiaries: 'Klaus Wagner' (Title: 'Regional Buyer') to the EU subsidiary and 'Yuki Tanaka' (Title: 'Procurement Director') to the APAC subsidiary. Link a deal named 'Q4 2026 Commercial Aviation Parts Contract' to the global headquarters with an amount of 1500000, an expected close date of 2026-09-30, and the sales stage set to 'Value Proposition'.
